full_text:
Feng Ze 馮則
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Feng Ze (馮則). A cavalry trooper, he pursued and personally cut down Huang Zu. Feng Ze was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
